name: NDRRMA Portal
description: National Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Authority - live incident mapping and disaster profiles.

name: Department of Hydrology and Meteorology
description: Real-time weather reports, river level monitoring, flood alerts, and warnings.

name: National Earthquake Monitoring & Research Center
description: Earthquake mapping, magnitudes, epicenters, and historical seismic research data in Nepal.

name: Ministry of Home Affairs (MoHA)
description: Government administration policies, national security updates, and crisis circulars.

name: Nepal Red Cross Society
description: Information on humanitarian assistance, active blood drives, volunteering, and local chapters.

name: Nepal Police Official Website
description: Reporting crime, tracking investigations, local station directories, and safety advisories.
